name: Data File Processor — Fetch, Transform, and Report to Slack
description: Fetches data files from Google Drive, uses Claude AI to analyze and transform the data (summarize, clean, restructure), and posts a structured report to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Working with Excel spreadsheet files (xls & xlsx)

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the data report

driveQuery.default: mimeType = 'application/vnd.google-apps.spreadsheet' or mimeType contains 'spreadsheet' or mimeType contains 'excel'
driveQuery.description: Google Drive query to find data files

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to process

transformGoal.default: Summarize the data, identify trends, highlight anomalies, and provide key statistics
transformGoal.description: What transformation or analysis to perform on the data

steps.name: List data files from Google Drive
Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Build Slack Block Kit data report
